title: rubus hystrix microgene abietinus
intro: Rubus hystrix microgene abietinus, also known as the prickly thistle or thistle prickly, is a lesser-known species of the Rubus genus, which includes raspberries, blackberries, and related plants. It is a small, woody shrub with thistle-like leaves and stems, known for its medicinal properties. Rubus hystrix microgene abietinus has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, inflammation, and skin irritations, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus hystrix microgene abietinus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing.
